emails.subject: TW Tariff Updates
emails.body: TW Tariff Updates Mark, Should I send the TW tariff updates for Paul to you in EB1343 until you both have permanent offices? Naomi Bourg Rates and Tariffs Naomi.Bourg@enron.com Phone: 402-398-7066 Fax: 402-398-7006

emails.subject: RE: TW Tariff Updates
emails.body: RE: TW Tariff Updates You can send it which ever way is easiest for you. If it is just the same, I would send his seperately. He is located at: EB1344. Thanks, Mark

emails.subject: RE: TW Tariff Updates
emails.body: Mark, I will send the updates to Paul at EB 1344. Naomi
